3. Get the status of a Check Point task
Shows status of a Check Point task, by task UUID.
Base Command
checkpoint-task-status
Input

!checkpoint-set-rule name="bar-from-6.6.6.5" layer="8a5e96fb-c793-457f-b78f-c667074223a5"
Human Readable Output
3. Get the status of a Check Point task
Shows status of a Check Point task, by task UUID.
Base Command
checkpoint-task-status
Input
Argument Name
name: checkpoint-task-status

outputs.description: The object name. Should be unique in the domain. CheckpointFWTask.UID The unique identifier of the object.
outputs.name: CheckpointFWTask.Name

outputs.description: The object type. CheckpointFWTask.Domain Information about the domain that the object belongs to.
outputs.name: CheckpointFWTask.Type

outputs.description: The object name. Should be unique in the domain. CheckpointFWTask.Domain.UID The unique identifier of the object.
outputs.name: CheckpointFWTask.Domain.Name

outputs.description: Domain type. CheckpointFWTask.LastUpdateTime The last update date and time (in international ISO 8601 format).
outputs.name: CheckpointFWTask.Domain.Type

outputs.description: The object creation time. CheckpointFWTask.MetaInfo.Creator The object creator.
outputs.name: CheckpointFWTask.MetaInfo.CreationTime

outputs.description: The last modifier of object. CheckpointFWTask.MetaInfo.LastModifyTime The object last modification time.
outputs.name: CheckpointFWTask.MetaInfo.LastModifier

outputs.description: The object lock state. Editing objects locked by other sessions is not supported. CheckpointFWTask.MetaInfo.ValidationStatus The object validation state (ok, info, warning, error).
outputs.name: CheckpointFWTask.MetaInfo.LockStatus

outputs.description: The object progress percentage. CheckpointFWTask.ReadOnly Read only.
outputs.name: CheckpointFWTask.ProgressPercentage

outputs.description: The start time date and time (in international ISO 8601 format). CheckpointFWTask.Status The task status.
outputs.name: CheckpointFWTask.StartTime

outputs.description: Is suppressed. CheckpointFWTask.Tags A collection of tag objects identified by the name or UID. The level of detail returned depends on the “details-level” field of the request. This table shows the level of detail shown when “details-level” is set to standard.
outputs.name: CheckpointFWTask.Suppressed

outputs.description: The task details. The level of detail returned depends on the “details-level” field of the request. This table shows the level of detail shown when “details-level” is set to standard. CheckpointFWTask.ID
outputs.name: CheckpointFWTask.Details
